_template_meta.notes: Use this template for state-organized outreach datasets. Treat the state as the parent record and agencies, universities, hospitals, and leaders as child records.

governor_or_agency_priorities: Health equity and measurable resource allocation
pain_points: Need for defensible county and tract prioritization
Need to align planning, funding, and intervention targeting

campaign.success_definition: Secure the right owner, a live conversation, or a clear redirect.

_meta.why_this_account_matters: Primary state agency route for county and community health prioritization.

organization_profile.department_route: Planning, rural health, epidemiology, or community health
organization_profile.routing_note: Use the official routing page first unless a higher-confidence named route is already known.
organization_profile.procurement_notes: Add later when state procurement research is complete.

contact_persons.name: Example Person
contact_persons.title: Deputy Commissioner
contact_persons.notes: Use after official route or when a warm referral exists.

outreach_content.state_specific_hook: Tennessee-first county and tract prioritization for rural and community health decision-making.
outreach_content.official_route_subject: Brief question on Tennessee county and community prioritization
outreach_content.official_route_body: Hello, I am reaching out because Tennessee appears to be working on county and community health prioritization questions that align closely with the work our team is doing. If this belongs with a planning, rural health, or epidemiology owner, I would appreciate being pointed in the right direction.
outreach_content.linkedin_connection_note: Hi [First Name] - reaching out because your role looks highly relevant to Tennessee's county and community prioritization work.
outreach_content.linkedin_message: Hi [First Name], I am reaching out because your role appears close to Tennessee's planning and prioritization work. We are working on an auditable county and tract prioritization approach and would value a short discussion if this topic is in your lane.
outreach_content.email_subject: Tennessee question on county and community prioritization
outreach_content.email_body:
Hello [Name],

I am reaching out because your role appears relevant to Tennessee's work on county and community health prioritization. We are focused on an auditable approach to tract and county decision support and would appreciate a short conversation if this topic belongs with your team.

Best,
[Name]
outreach_content.call_opening: We are trying to reach the best person for county and community health prioritization, rural health planning, or related analytics support.

payload.name: Example Sender
payload.subject: Brief question on Tennessee county and community prioritization
payload.message: Hello, I am reaching out because Tennessee appears to be working on county and community health prioritization questions that align closely with the work our team is doing. If this belongs with a planning, rural health, or epidemiology owner, I would appreciate being pointed in the right direction.

calling.call_script: Hello, we are trying to reach the best person for county and community health prioritization, planning, or rural health measurement. Who is the best contact for that?
